summary: Web application with Google AdSense integration
architectural_notes: Google AdSense integration configured with client ID ca-pub-7830122739302232

existing_features.title: Add the Google AdSense verification script to the global <head> section in frontend/index.html before the closing </head> tag. The script to add is: <script async src="https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-7830122739302232" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>. Ensure it does not duplicate if already present.
